response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms, but the role specifically requires deep JVM expertise, hands-on Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus experience, and genuine interest in IDE internals and language tooling. The resume shows only brief, dated exposure to Java (robotic arms work over a decade ago) and C/C++ IDE component work at National Instruments in 2008, with no demonstrated Kotlin, Spring ecosystem, or modern JVM tooling experience. Primary stack and recent work are misaligned with enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE development.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Prior C/C++ IDE component experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, test frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only minimal, dated Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate ecosystem experience listed
Recent work centered on TypeScript/Node and DLang, not JVM internals or language tooling

key_factors.factor: Recent stack misaligned with JVM tooling
